authPages.subTitle: Connect your, living
authPages.description:
Solid Home is a seamless home ecosystem.
It is where absolute precision meets pure aesthetics.
We design experiences, not just technology.
Take full control of your world—with a single, intuitive touch.
authPages.welcomeBackDescription: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
authPages.createAccountDescription: Join to community of  Solid Home
authPages.passwordRecoveryDescription: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.

authPagesErrors.userNameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
authPagesErrors.userNamePattern: Username can only contain letters and numbers
authPagesErrors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
